properties.comment: Temporal Sequenced Rewrites Test Cases for TPC-H queries
properties.entry: SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( select s.acctbal, s.name, n.name, p.partkey, p.mfgr, s.address, s.phone, s.comment from t_part WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) p, t_supplier WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) s, t_partsupp WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) ps, t_nation WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) n, t_region WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) r where p.partkey = ps.partkey and s.suppkey = ps.suppkey and p.size = 15 and p.type like '%BRASS' and s.nationkey = n.nationkey and n.regionkey = r.regionkey and r.name = 'EUROPE' and ps.supplycost = ( select min(ps2.supplycost) from t_partsupp WITH TIME(t_b, t_e) ps2, t_supplier s, t_nation n, (SELECT * FROM t_region r2 WHERE r2.name = 'Europe') WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) r3 where p.partkey = ps2.partkey and s.suppkey = ps2.suppkey and s.nationkey = n.nationkey and n.regionkey = r3.regionkey ) );

SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( select o.orderpriority, count(*) as order_count from t_orders WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) o where o.orderdate >= '1993-07-01' and o.orderdate < '1993-10-01' and exists ( select * from (select * from t_lineitem l2 where l2.commitdate < l2.receiptdate) WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) l where l.orderkey = o.orderkey ) group by o.orderpriority );

SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( select * from ( select ps.partkey, sum(ps.supplycost * ps.availqty) as value from t_partsupp WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) ps, t_supplier WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) s, t_nation WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) n where ps.suppkey = s.suppkey and s.nationkey = n.nationkey and n.name = 'GERMANY' group by ps.partkey ) as inner_query where value > ( select sum(ps2.supplycost * ps2.availqty) * 0.0001 from t_partsupp WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) ps2, t_supplier WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) s2, (SELECT nationkey FROM t_nation WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) WHERE name = 'GERMANY') n2 where ps2.suppkey = s2.suppkey and s2.nationkey = n2.nationkey ) );

SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( with revenue_view as ( select l.suppkey as supplier_no, sum(l.extendedprice * (1 - l.discount)) as total_revenue from t_lineitem WITH TIME(t_b, t_e) l where l.shipdate >= '1996-01-01' and l.shipdate < '1996-04-01' group by l.suppkey) select s.suppkey, s.name, s.address, s.phone, total_revenue from t_supplier WITH TIME(t_b, t_e) s, revenue_view where s.suppkey = supplier_no and total_revenue = ( select max(total_revenue) from revenue_view ) );

SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( SELECT p.brand, p.type, p.size, count(DISTINCT ps.suppkey) AS supplier_cnt FROM t_partsupp WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) ps JOIN (SELECT * FROM t_part WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) p2 WHERE p2.brand <> 'Brand#45' AND NOT (p2.type like 'MEDIUM POLISHED%') AND p2.size IN (49, 14, 23, 45, 19, 3, 36, 9) ) p ON p.partkey = ps.partkey WHERE ps.suppkey NOT IN (SELECT s.suppkey FROM t_supplier WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) s WHERE s.comment like '%Customer%Complaints%' ) GROUP BY p.brand, p.type, p.size );

SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( SELECT sum(l.extendedprice) / 7.0 as avg_yearly FROM t_lineitem WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) l JOIN (SELECT partkey AS p_partkey, brand, container, t_b, t_e FROM t_part p2 WHERE p2.brand = 'Brand#23' AND p2.container = 'MED BOX' ) WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) p ON p.p_partkey = l.partkey WHERE l.quantity < ( select 0.2 * avg(ll.quantity) from t_lineitem WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) ll where ll.partkey = p.p_partkey ) );

SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( SELECT s.name, s.address FROM t_supplier WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) s, t_nation WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) n WHERE s.suppkey IN ( SELECT ps.suppkey FROM t_partsupp WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) ps WHERE ps.partkey in ( SELECT p.partkey FROM t_part WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) p WHERE p.name = 'forest%' ) AND ps.availqty > ( SELECT 0.5 * sum(l.quantity) FROM t_lineitem WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) l WHERE l.partkey = ps.partkey AND l.suppkey = ps.suppkey AND l.shipdate >= '1994-01-01' AND l.shipdate < '1995-01-01' ) ) AND s.nationkey = n.nationkey AND n.name = 'CANADA' );

SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( select s.name, count(*) as numwait from t_supplier WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) s, t_lineitem WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) l1, t_orders WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) o, t_nation WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) n where s.suppkey = l1.suppkey and o.orderkey = l1.orderkey and o.orderstatus = 'F' and l1.receiptdate > l1.commitdate and exists ( select * from (SELECT orderkey AS orderkey_r, suppkey AS suppkey_r FROM t_lineitem WITH TIME (t_b, t_e)) l2 where l2.orderkey_r = l1.orderkey and l2.suppkey_r <> l1.suppkey ) and not exists ( select * from (SELECT orderkey AS orderkey_rr, suppkey AS suppkey_rr FROM t_lineitem WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) WHERE receiptdate > commitdate) l3 where l3.orderkey_rr = l1.orderkey and l3.suppkey_rr <> l1.suppkey ) and s.nationkey = n.nationkey and n.name = 'SAUDI ARABIA' group by s.name );

SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( select cntrycode, count(*) as numcust, sum(custsale.acctbal) as totacctbal from ( select substr(c.phone, 1, 2) as cntrycode, c.acctbal from (SELECT * FROM t_customer cc WHERE substr(cc.phone, 1, 2) in ('70')) WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) c where c.acctbal > ( select avg(c2.acctbal) from t_customer WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) c2 where c2.acctbal > 0.00 and substr(c2.phone, 1, 2) in ('70') ) and not exists ( select * from t_orders WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) o where o.custkey = c.custkey ) ) as custsale group by cntrycode );
